raw_input:
[4.0/5] Airbrushy, beautiful foundation application! First, let me get a disclaimer out of the way ... I received this item at a discount in exchange for leaving an honest, unbiased review ... but I'd buy another one at full price if I needed it. I hate having to wonder whether a review is legit or not as I, too, do a LOT of Amazon shopping and use reviews to make purchase decisions. So I'll ALWAYS tell the truth, even if it isn't pretty. So here goes!

I've tried the original Beauty Blender and then tried a few mocks to see how they'd compare - in an attempt to save some money after having to trash the original after 3 o 4 months of use for sanitary/skincare reasons. All the others did an OK job, but nowhere near how nicely the original applied my foundation ... until this one!

I'm so stoked that I found a reasonably priced substitute for the original Beauty Blender (who wants to pay $20 if they can get away with pay8ing $8-ish for the same result?). This one really feels like the expensive ones, is also latex free and applies my foundation like a dream - airbrushy, smooth, consistently blended. I love it! Definitely buying a few more to have on hand as I have to replace them. There's no weird scent or anything, in case you've ever had blending sponges that did have an odd smell. I'm not sure what benefit the vitamin E infusion is, but I'd buy this sponge either way. [5.0/5] Good BB Alternative Having tried the Beauty Blender sponges, I was looking for a cheaper alternative. This one fits the bill VERY well. It's the closest in texture to the BB that I have found yet. I find that it blends my makeup just as well as my BB at less than 1/3 of the price! It's just a little bit larger than the BB, compared side-by-side, when wet and I like that. I will definitely be repurchasing when I wear this one out. I have had it for a week and used/washed it four times, so far, and it's holding up perfectly. [5.0/5] A dupe for the brand name blender? in my opinion, YES!! This is absolutely the softest beauty blending sponge I've ever used, and I've used a lot! Most makeup sponges are much more dense and don't soften very much, even when it's filled with water. This sponge is so incredibly soft and squishy right out of the package! I washed it before using it the first time and it did nearly double in size. This sponge doesn't soak up much of my makeup and it bounces across my skin easily making my skin look flawless. So far, I've used it mostly for my foundation, but I've used it a couple times for my undereye concealer and powder. I've also used the pointed end around my nose and in the corners of my eyes to make sure everything is covered. I'm very happy with this beauty sponge, it does everything it says it will and it does it extremely well! If you're looking for a less expensive 'beauty blender' - this is the one for you! It's by far the closest to the brand name one that I've ever used. I'll be buying a couple more of these just to have them on hand.

* I received this beauty blender at a slight discount (not free) and my review is my own ~ I have absolutely no reason to give it stars it doesn’t deserve. When I shop online, I rely heavily on the reviews of others, so I make sure that when I write my own, you get the full story. If it’s a good, bad or ugly product - I will always review it fairly. I hope you have found my review helpful! [5.0/5] Most blenders I've tried feel like I'm punching my face lol but being a makeup ... Was extremely soft!!!! Most blenders I've tried feel like I'm punching my face lol but being a makeup artist I loved the texture and the coverage from this product [5.0/5] Great for blending, contouring, and precision application of makeup! This make-up sponge feels good in the hand--not too big and not too small. It is perfect in terms of being able to not only apply my foundation with the wide end, but also using the narrower sides and end to blend and to cover those smaller areas around my mouth, nose, and eye areas. I recently invested in some more expensive, quality makeup, and decided that I needed to find a quality sponge. This sponge will last, It also cleans easily--I just wash it with a gentle hand soap and rinse it out. It does not lose its shape--it is a nice firm sponge. It also does not smell "funny" like some sponges do after they have been used and washed a few times. This sponge is a great addition to my make up, and in fact is the best blending sponge that I have found yet. I did purchase this sponge at a discount for purposes of providing an honest, unbiased review. I like how well this sponge works for me, and will continue to purchase it. [5.0/5] Blends makeup beautifully once you know how to use it! I have had my eye on the makeup blender sponges at Ulta, but just couldn’t justify the price. This is a much more affordable option and it has a very feminine, pretty packaging. I haven’t tried the more expensive ones to be able to compare them, but I can compare the effects of this sponge compared to my nice makeup brushes.

The first day I used the sponge I was really disappointed. I dipped it in water and dried it off on a towel and put my makeup (It cosmetics CC cream) on the big end of the sponge. Then I used it to rub the makeup all over my face. And there was very little makeup on my face! I was thinking I wasted my money. Then I put the sponge in water to try to clean it off and it expanded A LOT – over half an inch in length and so much in diameter that it would no longer fit inside the packaging. I figured I had used it wrong. I put on my makeup with my brushes and decided to seek more information on how to use the sponge for the next day.

Before trying my sponge the second day, I watched a few YouTube videos on how to use makeup blender sponges. I had definitely used it wrong the first day! It is important to get the sponge really wet and fully expanded before using it to help keep the sponge from absorbing your makeup. So this time I let it fully expand in the water then blotted it dry on a towel. I then used it to blot my makeup all over my face. This technique actually worked.

After playing around with different methods, I have found that spotting my face with the makeup first and then using the sponge to blot it all over my face before the makeup dries works the best. I get a nice airbrushed finish without streaks from a brush. It has also helped me to not put on too much makeup. With the brushes I was having problems with having excess makeup in certain areas of my face. By the end of the day my hands and everything in sight would be covered in makeup! With the sponge I haven’t had this issue – it seems to really help the makeup blend into your skin and not just pile up and rub off.

I did receive this item at a discounted rate in exchange for an honest review. I have been pleased with how it works and would recommend it to others who are interested in the makeup blender sponges but don’t want to waste money on the pricey name-brand ones or on cheaper ones that don’t work. [5.0/5] Five Stars I love it! [5.0/5] I really liked the blending sponge I really liked the blending sponge! I've bought several much more expensive sponges in the last few years and I think this works just as well if not better than the others, at a much better price. I have used it for several weeks and besides the normal discoloration that you'd expect with foundation, the shape or softness hasn't changed at all. I will definitely be trying their other sponges and buying a new one in a few weeks!

I received this discounted product in exchange for a review. However, this discount does not cloud my judgment. I value opinions of others on product reviews. [5.0/5] First time user, impressed with application This is my first time using a make up sponge and I was highly impressed. I used liquid foundation a couple years ago and couldn't get a smooth application. My fingers left my face looking splotchy and a foundation brush applied the liquid too thick. I switched to mineral powder foundation for better coverage, but it's messy and not travel friendly. I saw this and wanted to try it. I have no other brands to compare it to, but these are my impressions: It's about the size of an egg, it becomes nice and soft and expands when submerged in water. I watched a couple youtube videos for guidance on the technique. I put some liquid makeup on the back side of my hand and dabbed it on. I had great coverage after about two layers. The sponge provided good coverage for my redness and I did't get any irritation like I normally do from my mineral brush sweeping across my sensitive skin. Overall, I am really glad I purchased this. It seems like a good density sponge that won't fall apart. The packaging says this should be washed after every use and replaced every two months. I'm looking forward to taking it on my upcoming trip and not worrying about all my mineral make up sifting through the lid during travel! I received this item at a discount in exchange for my review, but will definitely purchase again before paying 3 times the cost for other brands sold at high end make up stores. [4.0/5] Really good makeup blending sponge Really good makeup blending sponge. I like the way this blends the makeup seamlessly without leaving any lines. The only downfall i have with this product is that it seems like quite a bit of the makeup get stuck in the sponge. [4.0/5] Great Buy! I absolutely love this sponge. Will buy over and over again! [5.0/5] Five Stars This is a great blending sponge. Would definitely recommend. [5.0/5] I love that it is infused with Vitamin E This is the softest beauty blender I have used! I love that it is infused with Vitamin E. If you have never used one of these, you should definitely try it. It blends your makeup evenly and you don't use as much product. Just be sure to wet the sponge first and just use it for blending, not application. I learned that lesson the hard way. I tried putting my BB cream directly on the sponge and found that it soaked up a ton of the product. However, if I applied the BB cream with my fingers and then used the sponge just for blending, it worked much better. [5.0/5] This has been the best beauty blender I've ever used This has been the best beauty blender I've ever used! It expands to a larger size and is really soft. Some other beauty blenders stay really firm no matter how wet you get them, but this one wasn't too firm at all. It is also super easy to clean and looks brand new! Some other beauty blenders keep some of the makeup shade on them no matter how well you clean them, but this one looks brand new once you clean it. I will be buying again if anything happens to this one! [3.0/5] Eh its not as soft as I was expecting or ... Eh its not as soft as I was expecting or hoping it to be. Its regular to me. But it gets the job done

response:
Customers mostly love this makeup blending sponge. Many say it work just like expensive Beauty Blender but cost much less, around $8 versus $20. Sponge very soft, expand when wet, blend foundation smooth like airbrush. Latex free, no weird smell, vitamin E inside. Easy clean, hold shape good after many washes. Work well for foundation, concealer, powder, contouring. Pointed end good for nose and eye corners.

Few warnings from customers: must wet sponge fully before use or it soak up too much makeup. Better to put makeup on face first, then blend with sponge. Some say sponge absorb bit too much product. One customer say not as soft as expected but still get job done.

Most plan to buy again. Many compare directly to Beauty Blender and say this one just as good or better. First time sponge users also happy. Overall very positive, most give 5 stars.
